name: React Native — animation, gestures, scroll (HIGH)
description: Animate `transform` + `opacity` (GPU), not layout props. Prefer `useDerivedValue` over `useAnimatedReaction` for derivations. Use `GestureDetector` + worklets for press micro-interactions. Never drive scroll offset with `useState` — use Reanimated shared values or refs.

metadata.intent: Keep animations on the UI thread and avoid scroll-driven render thrashing

must_use: UI-thread scroll handlers for animated headers
must_not: Animate width/height/margin per frame unless unavoidable
conventions: Store press/open as state shared value; derive visuals via `interpolate`.

steps.description: Prefer `translateY` / `scale` / `opacity` over layout-driven animations for expand/collapse and transitions.
Use `useDerivedValue` for computed shared values; reserve `useAnimatedReaction` for true side effects (haptics, logging, `runOnJS`).
For animated press states, prefer `GestureDetector` + `Gesture.Tap()` worklets over `Pressable` `onPressIn/out` when you need UI-thread smoothness.
Do not store `contentOffset.y` in `useState` for high-frequency scroll; use Reanimated `useSharedValue` + `useAnimatedScrollHandler` or a ref.
